item9.title: Franchisee's Obligations
obligations: Site selection subject to franchisor approval
Pre-opening purchases from approved suppliers only
Site development per franchisor standards/plans
Initial and ongoing training (PTP)
Fee payments (royalty, advertising, rent, tech fees, etc.)
Compliance with Manual and all standards/policies
Trademark/proprietary information restrictions
Sell only authorized products/services
Warranty and customer service per franchisor standards
Territorial development per schedule (if Dev Agreement)
Ongoing product purchases from approved suppliers
Maintenance, remodeling per franchisor requirements
Insurance at franchisor-specified levels
Advertising contributions and local advertising approval
Indemnification of franchisor
Owner participation (Managing Director, Managing Owner)
Records/reports (monthly P&L, quarterly financials)
Submit to inspections/audits
Transfer only with prior written consent
Renewal per franchisor conditions
Post-termination de-identification and noncompete
Noncompetition covenants (chicken QSR within 10 miles)
Dispute resolution in Florida
10%+ owners must guarantee all obligations
restrictions: Cannot operate competing chicken business
Cannot use confidential information for AI
Cannot operate website/social media without approval
rights: Set own prices (except franchisor max-price items)

item10.title: Financing
obligations: Must secure own financing
If using Ascentium/LEAF, must meet credit requirements and provide personal guaranty
restrictions: Cannot prepay LEAF loan
Ascentium prepayment penalty of 1% per remaining year
rights: May use Ascentium ($5K-$2M at ~7.25%) or LEAF ($5K-$2M at 8.25%-12.50%) equipment financing

item11.title: Training and Technology
obligations: Complete PTP (115 hours, 6 weeks) for minimum 5 managers (first restaurant) or 3-4 (additional)
Pay $5,000 per participant training fee
Maintain 1 RGM + 3 shift managers as Popeyes Certified Managers at all times
Replace departed managers in PTP within 30 days
Purchase/maintain POS, BOH, kiosk, digital menu boards, computer, tablet per specifications
Pay POS/BOH maintenance ($3K-$6.5K/yr each), menu maintenance ($300-$500/mo)
Allow franchisor to poll all POS/BOH data without limitation
Contribute to Ad Fund weekly (4.6%-5.0%+ of Gross Sales)
Join Co-op if established in DMA and contribute per Co-op rules
All local advertising must be approved by franchisor
Attend mandatory training programs
Upgrade/update all technology per franchisor specifications (no limit on frequency or cost)
restrictions: Cannot use non-approved POS/BOH vendors
Cannot use non-approved advertising agencies
Cannot run local advertising without approval
rights: May request Co-op waiver (at franchisor discretion)
Receive annual unaudited Ad Fund accounting on request

item12.title: Territory
obligations: Operate only from approved location
Cannot relocate without written consent
restrictions: No exclusivity under TRA/MTRA
Protected Area limited to lesser of 1-mile radius or 50,000 population
Alternative Venues excluded from protection
Cannot use alternative distribution channels
No right to acquire additional franchises under Franchise Agreement
Receive no compensation for franchisor alternative distribution channel sales
rights: Solicit/accept orders from customers outside Protected Area (subject to delivery restrictions)
triggers: Franchisor can reduce Protected Area for population shifts
Sister brands (BK, TH, FHS) can operate in same market

item13.title: Trademarks
obligations: Follow all trademark usage rules
Promptly notify franchisor of suspected infringement
Sign documents and cooperate in trademark litigation
Immediately adopt new/substitute marks upon notice
restrictions: Cannot use marks as part of entity name
Cannot use marks with modifying words/designs/symbols
Cannot use marks in unauthorized products/services
Cannot operate website without written consent
Cannot use marks in domain names or email without approval
Cannot create social media pages with marks
rights: Use POPEYES and POPEYES LOUISIANA KITCHEN marks during term per agreement

item14.title: Patents, Copyrights, Proprietary Information
obligations: Maintain confidentiality of Manual and all proprietary information during and after term
Obtain signed confidentiality agreements from all managers, assistant managers, trained personnel, and 10%+ owners
Divulge confidential information only to employees who need access
restrictions: Cannot use confidential information for machine learning or AI model training
Cannot input confidential information into generative AI platforms
Must opt out of AI provider training on PLK data
rights: Use copyrighted materials per agreement terms

item15.title: Obligation to Participate
obligations: Designate Managing Director (full-time, primary residence nearby, complete all PTP modules)
Designate Managing Owner (10%+ interest, authority to bind, sign certification)
Certified Manager on-site at all times during operation
Hire additional supervisor at 8th restaurant and every 7-10 after
Meet with PLK representatives in person at designated locations on request
10%+ owners must jointly and severally guarantee all obligations
restrictions: Managing Director cannot engage in other substantial business
Managing Director cannot own/operate competing chicken business
Managing Owner subject to 2-year post-termination noncompete
rights: Franchisee is sole employer of all restaurant employees (PLK not joint employer)

item16.title: Restrictions on What Franchisee May Sell
obligations: Operate solely as Popeyes Restaurant
Keep restaurant open for hours/days specified in Manual
Offer all and only authorized products/services
Promptly comply with menu changes
restrictions: Cannot sell unauthorized products
Delivery only through approved providers and PLK digital platforms
Franchisor can set maximum prices on certain items
rights: Sell to any customer (subject to delivery restrictions)
